data.body: All 3 stories CLOSED with signed plan-review + completion-verifier attestations (S1 2ee4, S2 40b8, S3 8451). S2 needed 2 verifier remediation cycles: added a seam-dispatch test patching T2_BACKENDS + refute_semantic (AC-literal) and ev.validate(rec); folded into S2 via scripted rebase (twice). Sibling IaC epic a374 created+linked. Local stack clean: 3 commits on worktree-loft-teeth-zip, each with Change-Id + rebar-ticket trailer, 236 grounding tests + lint + typecheck green. Next: Gerrit landing (feature branch) + close epic 850f.
